result.summary: Found 4 issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, including truncated game cards, cut-off text, and minor layout concerns.

issues.description: Multiple game cards on the right side are visually cut off/truncated. The third column of game tiles (e.g., 'Magni Pho...' and 'Munc Mi...') are clipped at the right edge, making titles and imagery incomplete.
issues.suggestion: Implement proper horizontal scrolling with visible scroll indicators, or adjust the grid layout so full cards are visible or clearly indicated as scrollable with a visible affordance.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab label in the top navigation bar is cut off, making the tab label unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Ensure navigation tabs either wrap to a new line, use a horizontal scroll with clear affordance, or abbreviate labels consistently with tooltips.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar icons appear to have inconsistent visual weight — the 'Poker' icon is highlighted in gold/yellow while others are muted, but the active state styling could be clearer for the currently selected section.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the active navigation tab has a more distinct background or underline indicator to improve clarity of the selected state.

issues.description: The third game card in the 'Top Played New Games' bottom row appears mostly dark/black with very little visible content, suggesting an image may have failed to load or is very dark.
issues.suggestion: Verify the game thumbnail images are loading correctly and have sufficient contrast/brightness to be recognizable at small sizes.
